scope: Romania 2025-2026 knowledge/test layer for SigurScan corpus, registry, parser, provider smoke tests.
hard_rules: Marketing text, hidden links, tracking links or shorteners are not sufficient alone for PERICULOS.
Scam URLs in CI fixtures use .test/.invalid/.example only.
Community/noisy sources are acceptance-test/pattern-discovery only, not hard evidence.
Corpus/RAG similarity-only max verdict is SUSPECT unless combined with provider/sandbox/confirmed campaign/domain evidence.
